description:
A screenshot of a user interface element, specifically a vertical drop-down menu containing four options. Each option is presented with an icon to its left and text. The options are:
1.  "Open" (accompanied by a document icon).
2.  "Open Classes" (accompanied by an icon depicting a triangle, a square, and a circle).
3.  "Open Datasets" (accompanied by a document icon).
4.  "Open Extractions" (accompanied by a paper airplane or 'send' icon).
